title: NEW LUXURY APARTMENTS IN DELTONA OFFERING UPTO 2 MONTHS FREE!
description:
Discover Cardinal Village in Deltona, FL —Offering up to 2 Months Free on select models if applied by July 15th! Already Prorated through the term of the lease on the displayed rental rate.*
Cardinal Village is a well-appointed community offering a fitness center, pool, and scenic lake views. Spacious floor plans provide comfortable living with easy access to on-site amenities for active and relaxed lifestyles alike. Located in Deltona, Cardinal Village combines convenient community features with pleasant outdoor vistas to help you feel at home.




 
 
 Rental Terms 
 
 Rent: $1,542 




 Application Fee: $95 



 Available Now
